cases.description: Off-topic greeting should not generate trades
cases.notes: Guardrail: casual input must not trigger trade proposals

checks.description: Summary should indicate the goal is not actionable

cases.description: Reduce concentration should propose at least one SELL trade
cases.notes: Model picks any overweight stock (HDFC by value, RELIANCE by price). Checking intent (SELL + concentration language) not a specific ticker.

checks.description: Summary must recommend trimming/selling a position

cases.description: AI Feedback mode must produce a full review with trades
cases.notes: Feedback mode uses a fixed system prompt — should always yield analysis

checks.description: Summary must cover portfolio health themes

cases.description: Goal to buy more of a specific stock should produce a BUY trade
cases.notes: User has 500k cash — model should propose at least one BUY

cases.description: Full rebalance request should produce multiple trades
cases.notes: Equal-weight rebalance requires selling overweight and buying underweight

cases.description: 'Sell everything' should be blocked as too risky with an explanation
cases.notes: Risk auditor rejects a full liquidation as too aggressive — 0 or more trades are valid, content check is what matters

checks.description: Summary must acknowledge the sell-all intent or explain why it was blocked

cases.description: Analyst must use live prices — risk auditor rejects hallucinated prices
cases.notes: If the analyst invents prices, the risk auditor should catch the >2% deviation and REJECT. A passing result (risk_approved=True) confirms the analyst used real tool data.

checks.description: Summary must reference actual fetched prices, not invented ones

cases.description: Large idle cash position must be flagged before any equity recommendation
cases.notes: Default seed portfolio has ~500k cash vs ~380k equity (~57% cash). Analyst rules require flagging cash > 50% of total value before anything else.

checks.description: Summary must call out the oversized cash position

cases.description: Goal mentioning an unsupported ticker must not produce a trade for it
cases.notes: TATAMOTORS is not in the supported ticker list. Analyst may refuse directly or risk auditor may reject — both paths should yield 0 trades and an explanation.

checks.description: Summary must explain the ticker is outside the supported list or that the plan was blocked

cases.description: Sell quantity exceeding current holdings must be blocked or corrected
cases.notes: Seed portfolio has 20 TCS shares. Analyst should refuse or cap the qty and explain. Either way no executable trade should be proposed — proposed_trades must be empty.

checks.description: Summary must explain the quantity cannot be fulfilled as requested
